headline: Accenture Stock Gets 2 Price Target Cuts Today — Is the AI Revenue Story Falling Apart?
summary: Accenture (NYSE:ACN) beat earnings estimates again on Thursday, raised full-year guidance, and posted record bookings. The stock still fell sharply. That disconnect is precisely what has two Wall Street firms cutting their price targets today, and it points to a deeper question about whether AI is actually driving new revenue growth at Accenture, or quietly ... Accenture Stock Gets 2 Price Target Cuts Today — Is the AI Revenue Story Falling Apart?

headline: Accenture And Microsoft Deepen AI Security Ties As Enterprise Demand Shifts
summary: Accenture (NYSE:ACN) has launched new AI driven cybersecurity capabilities in partnership with Microsoft. The company is introducing advanced agentic AI features for cybersecurity operations to help clients respond to cyber threats. Accenture also unveiled a forward deployed engineering practice designed to accelerate enterprise AI projects. For investors tracking NYSE:ACN, this announcement comes with the shares at $203.55 and a value score of 6. Recent performance has been mixed, with the...

headline: Microsoft AI Security And Fabric Partnerships Tested Against Valuation Discount
summary: Accenture and Microsoft are expanding their cybersecurity partnership with new AI driven threat detection and response capabilities across Microsoft security platforms. Microsoft Fabric IQ is adding native Lumel enterprise planning to support finance and operations teams on Microsoft’s data and AI stack. Deeper integration with UiPath connects Microsoft Defender and Sentinel to automated workflows that streamline threat detection and response for enterprise clients. For investors tracking...
